templateName: WORKOUT A — LEGS + MOBILITY + LOWER BACK

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.note: Slow 3-sec eccentric. Knee tracks over toe.

exercises.name: Copenhagen Plank
exercises.note: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Right side priority. Build 5 sec/week. Adductor fix.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.note: Add weight weekly. Full hip extension at top. Squeeze glutes.

exercises.name: Single Leg Press
exercises.note: Control the descent. Don't lock knee at top.

exercises.name: Hamstring Curl
exercises.note: Full range. Slow eccentric. Single leg from wk 8.

exercises.name: Back Extension
exercises.note: Slow and controlled. Feel glute and hamstring, not lower back.

exercises.name: Standing Hip Flexion with Band
exercises.note: Band low anchor. Drive knee to hip height. Trains the exact running pattern.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.note: Both legs wks 1-3. Single leg from wk 4. Full range.

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry
exercises.note: Heavy. Hips level. Lateral core for trail stability.

exercises.name: Single Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.note: Right side will shake more — that's the weakness. Drive through heel. Pelvis level.

exercises.name: Lateral Band Walk
exercises.note: Band above knees. Small steps, stay low. Trains glute med firing timing for running.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.note: Right arm/left leg focus. Lower back flat on floor. Stops QL compensating.

exercises.name: Hip 90/90 Rotation with Hold
exercises.note: Sit in 90/90. Rotate forward over each leg. Hold 3 sec. Fixes right hip capsule stiffness.

exercises.name: QL Trigger Point — Iliac Crest
exercises.note: Lacrosse ball on iliac crest top. Find tender point, hold, breathe. Do BEFORE foam roll. Every morning first.

exercises.name: QL Foam Roll (right side)
exercises.note: Between hip and lower ribs. Slow, not painful. After trigger point hold.

exercises.name: Adductor Rock-Back
exercises.note: Half-kneeling. Rock sideways into groin. Right side extra attention.

exercises.name: Couch Stretch
exercises.note: Push hips forward, stay tall. Critical pre-run.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Switches
exercises.note: Slow rotation. Don't force range.

exercises.name: Calf + Soleus Stretch
exercises.note: Straight knee = calf. Bent knee = soleus. Both matter for running.

exercises.name: QL Side Bend Stretch
exercises.note: Right arm overhead in doorframe, lean left, push right hip out. Every morning + post session.

exercises.name: 90/90 Breathing
exercises.note: On back, knees bent 90°. Breathe into lower back. Passive QL release. Every morning on waking.

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.note: Add weight when hitting 10 clean reps. Full hang at bottom.

exercises.name: One Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.note: Chest supported. Full range. Elbow drives back.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Increased volume. Shoulder health priority (dislocation history).

exercises.name: External Rotations
exercises.note: Light weight. Slow. Full range. Rotator cuff health.

exercises.name: Hip Abduction
exercises.note: Moved from Workout A. Lateral hip strength for trail stability.

exercises.name: Back Extension
exercises.note: Posterior chain. Don't hyperextend at top.

exercises.name: Ankle Dorsiflexions
exercises.note: Knee forward over toes. Trail ankle control.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.note: Opposite arm/leg. Spine neutral. Running posture.

exercises.name: Psoas March with Band
exercises.note: On back, band around feet, alternate knee drives. Hip flexor endurance.

exercises.name: Thoracic Rotation
exercises.note: Seated or 90/90. Running posture and shoulder mobility.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.note: Progressive overload weekly. Full range. Control the descent.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.note: Upper chest and anterior shoulder. 30-45 degree incline.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Overhead stability. Important post-dislocation.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Shoulder width. Light weight, slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Tricep Overhead Extension
exercises.note: Full range. Long head stretch.

exercises.name: Cable/Band Pushdown
exercises.note: Superset with lateral raises to save time.

exercises.name: Ankle Dorsiflexions
exercises.note: Consistency keeps ankles healthy under running load.

exercises.name: Soleus Stretch
exercises.note: Bent knee against wall. Essential for calf health in running load.

exercises.name: Hamstring Floor Stretch
exercises.note: Seated or lying. Breathe into the stretch.

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.note: Kneeling lunge. Right side extra time.
